calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights
Off Calendar Oct-02-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Conference:
Kimberly Pomerantz, Esq., of G&B LAW, LLP., Tel: (818) 382-6200 for petitioner
Malaysia Wallace self-represented respondent.

Hearing held. A timely Notice of Contest was received from petitioner counsel. The petitioner states that they are unable to increase the cap any further.The matter argued/discussed. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Petitioner J.G. Wentworth Originations LLC's unopposed Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights is taken under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

**An order denying the petition is signed after the hearing.**
